industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Enlight Renewable Energy Ltd
summary: Enlight Renewable Energy Ltd operates in the field of renewable energy. It engages in the initiation, development, financing, construction, management, and operation of projects in the field of electricity generation from renewable energy sources. The company develops and operates solar and wind energy projects. As of October 12, 2020, it had operations in Israel and Europe with a diversified portfolio of income-generating projects, projects during construction, and pre-construction that total approximately 1.8GW and an additional 1.9 GW in initial development stages. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Rosh Ha'ayin, Israel.
